title: WKS Form.io `recordtype` extension component
description: Normative reference for the WKS-specific Form.io component `type: "recordtype"`. This pseudo-component is NOT known to standard Form.io or the backend; the portal (FormService.js requestRemoteDataSourceAndFillRecordTypesIfRequired) rewrites it at load time into a native `select`/`selectboxes` whose data.url points at /record/{recordType.id}. Documented here so the contract is explicit rather than tribal knowledge in one JS function.

inputType.description: 'selectone' is rewritten to a Form.io `select`; any other value becomes `selectboxes`.

template.description: Form.io item template used to render each option label.

id.description: RecordType.id whose records populate the options (live data.url = /record/{id}).

valueProperty.description: Property of each record used as the option value.
